indications.text:
Veltassa is indicated for the treatment of hyperkalemia.
Limitation of Use: Veltassa should not be used as an emergency treatment for life-threatening
hyperkalemia because of its delayed onset of action [see Pharmacodynamics (12.2)].

Veltassa is indicated for the treatment of hyperkalemia.
Limitation of Use: Veltassa should not be used as an emergency treatment for life-threatening
hyperkalemia because of its delayed onset of action [see Clinical Pharmacology (12.2)].

Limitation of Use: Veltassa should not be used as an emergency treatment for life-threatening
hyperkalemia because of its delayed onset of action [see Clinical Pharmacology (12.2)].
